public_doc_drift.rationale: The published mintlify SDK documentation claims Lens chain support, but the four-route Lens probe artifact at parity/lens-probe-results.json captured every CoW orderbook endpoint returning HTTP 404 on 2026-05-15, and the published @cowprotocol/sdk-config@2.0.0 package does not export a runtime Lens config. The SDK keeps Lens out of the SupportedChainId enum until both the source package and the live endpoints agree.
The package surface matches the upstream composable-cow contract bindings pinned in parity/source-lock.yaml.

The upstream CowShedSdk.ts source file at the pinned commit silently drops the caller-selected version when constructing CoWShedHooks instances. The Rust helper crate threads the caller-selected version through every internal builder and does not mirror the upstream bug; the COW Shed Contract Bindings Audit records the corrected behavior.
